title: Catalog latency spike after cache configuration change
summary: Catalog API latency jumps after a cache configuration update disables the hot cache path.
customer_impact: Product listing pages load slowly and some requests time out during browsing.
initial_signals: Alert: p95 latency on catalog-api rose from 180ms to 2.8s within 8 minutes.
Cache miss ratio climbed above 90% after a config rollout.
Search traffic volume is normal for the time window.

timeline.event: Cache miss ratio and upstream Redis timeouts rise together.
